python3 -c "
import numpy as np, glob
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'
files = glob.glob(base + '**/fit.tsv', recursive=True)[:5]
for f in files:
    import pandas as pd
    df = pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t')
    cols = df.columns.tolist()
    print(f.split('non-inhibited/')[1][:50], '| cols:', cols[:4], '| shape:', df.shape)
    x0 = df.iloc[:,0].values
    print(f'  x0 range: {x0.min():.2f}-{x0.max():.2f}')
"
